ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., paper, filament) */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor supplying the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the catalog */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is currently active */,
  "weight_grams" REAL /* Weight of the product in grams */,
  "weight_ounces" REAL /* Weight of the product in ounces */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Base price of the product */,
  "region_availability" TEXT /* Regions where the product is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper specification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product this specification belongs to */,
  "size_mm" TEXT /* Size of the paper in millimeters */,
  "size_inches" TEXT /* Size of the paper in inches */,
  "stack_capacity_inches" TEXT /* Thickness of the stack capacity in inches */,
  "sheet_capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of sheets (e.g., 5-35 Sheets) */,
  "filament_diameter" TEXT /* Diameter of the filament if applicable */,
  "weight_GSM" INTEGER /* Weight of the paper in grams per square meter */,
  "brightness" INTEGER /* Brightness level of the paper */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish type (e.g., matte, glossy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_specs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filament_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filament specification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product this specification belongs to */,
  "size_mm" TEXT /* Size of the filament in millimeters */,
  "size_inches" TEXT /* Size of the filament in inches */,
  "stack_capacity_inches" TEXT /* Thickness of the stack capacity in inches */,
  "sheet_capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of sheets (e.g., 5-35 Sheets) */,
  "filament_diameter" TEXT /* Diameter of the filament */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., PLA, ABS) */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Recommended printing temperature range */,
  "tensile_strength" REAL /* Tensile strength of the filament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filament_specs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Vendor rating based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level before reorder is needed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the product in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the transaction */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale occurred */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, sales, inventory) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Review comment from the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lifecycle" (
  "lifecycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifecycle event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the product (e.g., introduced, active, discontinued) */,
  "stage_date" TEXT /* Date of the stage change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the product's lifecycle stage */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the lifecycle stage change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifecycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lifecycle_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales revenue on that date */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of products sold on that date */,
  "highest_selling_product" TEXT /* Name of the highest selling product on that date */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of products sold on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_highest_selling_product FOREIGN KEY ("highest_selling_product") REFERENCES products ("product_name")
)
